headline: Woman's 'Meal Prep' Was Just A Single Avocado In A Tupperware That She Forgot To Eat For 3 Weeks
summary: The avocado has been named 'Gus' and has its own funeral planned.
fullBody: Amanda Prep posted her 'Sunday meal prep' — a single avocado in a glass container. She forgot to eat it. Three weeks later, the avocado (now named Gus) has been documented daily. 'He's part of the family now,' Amanda said. Gus has his own Instagram (@GusTheAvocado) with 47,000 followers. Amanda's meal prep now consists of 'remembering to eat.' Gus is being preserved in resin. The funeral is next Tuesday.
